name: Incidental Adrenal Finding CT
description: CT report template for incidental adrenal findings following ACR recommendations

findings.technique: Contrast-enhanced CT of the abdomen was performed with portal venous phase imaging.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Right Adrenal
sections.content: The right adrenal gland demonstrates [no mass / a X cm homogeneous mass / a X cm heterogeneous mass] with [low attenuation <10 HU / intermediate attenuation 10-20 HU / high attenuation >20 HU]. No irregular margins or invasion.

sections.name: Left Adrenal
sections.content: The left adrenal gland demonstrates [no mass / a X cm homogeneous mass / a X cm heterogeneous mass] with [low attenuation <10 HU / intermediate attenuation 10-20 HU / high attenuation >20 HU]. No irregular margins or invasion.

sections.name: Washout Characteristics
sections.content: If contrast given, the absolute washout is [X]% and relative washout is [X]% [consistent with adenoma / indeterminate / suggestive of adenoma].

sections.name: Size
sections.content: The adrenal mass measures [X] cm in greatest dimension.

sections.name: Other Findings
sections.content: No evidence of metastatic disease. No lymphadenopathy. The remainder of the study is unremarkable.

impression:
1. Incidental adrenal finding.
2. [X] cm [right/left] adrenal mass with attenuation of [X] HU.
3. Findings [are consistent with adenoma / require further evaluation with MRI or follow-up] per ACR incidental findings guidelines.
author: RadReport Templates
